hero.description: An app that connects your business with the most suitable truck on every trip.

features.title: Discover Saweg's Advantages
features.subtitle: The easiest way to get your shipments to their destination
features.description: Saweg is more than just an app; it is a platform that connects merchants with the best carriers on every trip. From a single app on your phone, you can post freight requests, receive multiple transparent offers, and choose the carrier that best fits your shipment. We are committed to making your freight movement faster, clearer, and more secure so your goods arrive where they should, with complete peace of mind.
features.promotionText: Fast, reliable, and efficient delivery service at your fingertips. Join thousands of satisfied users today!

howToUse.title: How to Use the App
howToUse.description: Get started in just a few simple steps
howToUse.step1: Download the app and create your account in less than a minute using basic information.
howToUse.step2: Send a transport request with ease: select the type of truck required, enter the type and weight of goods, specify the pickup and drop-off locations, and choose your preferred payment method.
howToUse.step3: Your request instantly reaches the drivers closest to the pickup location and most suitable for your requirements.
howToUse.step4: Each interested driver sends you their offer: departure time, required price, automatically accompanied by their previous ratings, number of completed trips, and truck specifications.
howToUse.step5: Compare offers, choose the one that suits you best, then contact the driver directly to confirm.
howToUse.step6: Track the shipment moment by moment on the map from loading to delivery.
howToUse.step7: After delivery is complete, rate the driver transparently (this helps everyone get better service).

whyUse.merchantDesc: A complete platform to manage all your freight needs. Through a single platform, you can access a network of qualified carriers, receive multiple transparent offers, and choose the most suitable for your requirements in terms of timing, location, and quality, with regular tracking for every trip.
whyUse.title: Why Partner with Saweg?
whyUse.tagline: Because your goods always deserve the best
whyUse.feature1Desc: A network of freight carriers ready to serve your shipment requests.
whyUse.feature2Desc: No need for multiple calls. One request brings you several offers in a short time.
whyUse.feature3Desc: See the price, delivery time, and carrier rating before confirming any trip.
whyUse.feature4Desc: All your requests and shipments are recorded in one place, with a clear history for each trip.
whyUse.feature5Title: Local Support in Arabic and English
whyUse.feature5Desc: Market support team, and assistance when you need it.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
